author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Investigating optimizer architecture. Adam stores exp_avg/exp_avg_sq as Vec<f64> on CPU. The entire step function downloads params+grads to CPU, does f64 math, uploads results. Plan: (1) change AdamParamState to use Tensor<T> on same device as param, (2) implement GPU Adam step using decomposed GPU ops (scale, mul, add, sqrt, div — all available from CL-218), (3) keep CPU fallback for small tensors or f64 params. Starting with Adam, then AdamW.
